subject: Re: Crashes on collapsing the settings panel.
body:
Thank you. For now I'm using 1.0.6 and it's working fine.

Best regards,
Kotaro

2019年11月11日月曜日 4時51分44秒 UTC+9 Dimitry Tegunov:
>
> Thanks for reporting! It's reproducible on my system and will be fixed in 
> the next release.
>
> On Thursday, November 7, 2019 at 8:10:25 PM UTC+1, Andrey Malyutin wrote:
>>
>> We have the same issue with Warp running on a K3 server.
>>
>> Andrey
>>
>> On Thursday, November 7, 2019 at 12:37:20 AM UTC-8, Kotaro Tanaka wrote:
>>>
>>> Hi,
>>>
>>> Warp 1.0.7 crashes when I attempt to collapse the settings panel (by 
>>> pressing the triangle button).
>>>
>>> I attached a screen shot of the error message from Warp.
>>>
>>> My environments:
>>> * Windows 10 Home version 1903 (11/6/2019)
>>> * Nvidia driver 441.12
>>> * Visual Studio 2019 Community installed
>>>
>>> I appreciate your help. Thank you in advance.
>>>
>>> Best regards,
>>> Kotaro
>>>
>>>
